task_completion.description: Navigate to the Odoo Quality module
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Odoo Quality module dashboard or main menu is visible in the browser.

task_completion.description: Open the Quality Alerts reporting view
task_completion.visual_evidence: The user is in the 'Reporting' section of the Quality module, displaying Quality Alerts data.

task_completion.description: Switch to the Pivot view configuration
task_completion.visual_evidence: The pivot view icon (table grid) is selected in the top right corner, and a pivot table is displayed on the screen.

task_completion.description: Group the defect counts by product
task_completion.visual_evidence: The rows or columns of the pivot table are explicitly grouped by 'Product', showing individual product names with their corresponding alert counts.

task_completion.description: Save the configuration as a favorite filter named 'Alerts by Product'
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Favorites' dropdown menu under the search bar shows a saved filter named exactly 'Alerts by Product', or a tag with a star icon labeled 'Alerts by Product' is active in the search bar.

integrity.description: Agent used the graphical user interface to configure the report
integrity.visual_evidence: The terminal is not used to run Python scripts, psql commands, or API requests to bypass the Odoo UI.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the genuine Odoo application
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the actual Odoo web interface in a browser, not a text editor or mock-up.

integrity.description: Agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the output
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser's 'Inspect Element' or developer console is not open to manipulate the DOM and fake the filter name or pivot data.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected filter name is exactly 'Alerts by Product'. The target model is 'quality.alert'. The grouping must be done by 'product_id' or 'product_tmpl_id' (which appears as 'Product' in the UI). There are at least 18 pre-populated quality alerts in the synthetic data, so the pivot table should show actual numerical data and product names, not an empty state.
